name: auschwitz-34207
description: Nancy Sprowell Geise's 'Auschwitz #34207: The Joe Rubinstein Story' — the remarkable true story of Holocaust survivor Joe Rubinstein, who survived Auschwitz, Nazi death camps, and a death march, and went on to live a full life of triumph, resilience, and testimony.
useCase: Bear witness to the Holocaust through one survivor's testimony — understand the camps, the death march, the liberation, and the power of resilience and memory.
knownRisks: Contains graphic descriptions of Holocaust atrocities
May be emotionally difficult for sensitive readers
One survivor's story cannot represent the full range of Holocaust experiences
